## Relationships (Application-Layer FKs)

**CUSTOMER_INTL** -> BIR_USER (ACKNOWL_RPTID->REPORT_ID, PACK_LIST_RPTID->REPORT_ID); CUSTOMER_MASTER (CUSTOMER -> CUSTOMER); EXCHANGE_CURRENCY (CATALOG_CURR->ISO_CODE, ORDER_CURR->ISO_CODE); PRICE_CAT_DISC (PRICE_CATG -> PRICE_CATG)

**CUSTOMER_MASTER** -> ACCTG_BRANCH (TERRITORY -> BRANCH_ID); AR_CRD_LIMIT (CREDIT -> CREDIT); AR_CREDIT_LIMIT (CREDIT -> CREDIT_CODE); GL_MASTER (NORMAL_GL_ACCOUNT -> GL_ACCOUNT); SALESPERSONS (SALESPERSON -> ID); USER_GROUPS (ASSGN_USR_GRP -> GS_GROUP)

**CUSTOMER_PART** -> CUSTOMER_MASTER (CUSTOMER -> CUSTOMER); INVENTORY_MSTR (LOCATION->LOCATION, PART->PART)

**CUSTOMER_SALES** -> AR_TERMS_DESCR (PAYMENT_TERMS->TERMS_CODE, THRSHLD_TERMS->TERMS_CODE); CUSTOMER_MASTER (CUSTOMER -> CUSTOMER); OE_PRC_CLASS_DISC (PRICE_CLASS -> PRC_CODE); PROJECT_MASTER (PROJECT -> PROJECT)

**CUSTOMER_SHIPTO** -> CUSTOMER_MASTER (CUSTOMER -> CUSTOMER); SHIP_VIA (SHIP_VIA -> ID)

**CUSTOMER_TAX** -> CUSTOMER_MASTER (CUST -> CUSTOMER)

**CUSTOMER_TAX_AUTH** -> AR_TAX_TABLES (TAX_AUTH->AUTH, TAX_ZONE->ZONE); CUSTOMER_MASTER (CUST -> CUSTOMER)

**CUSTOMER_VAT** -> CUSTOMER_MASTER (CUST -> CUSTOMER)
